chosen_action.title: Respect same-family pause windows in distribution lane selection

why_this_action.summary: The audit paused same-family directory and curator bursts, but the selector still pointed at curator_outreach. Repairing the selector is higher leverage than letting another run chase a lane the system already knows it should not repeat.

expected_outcome.primary_goal: stop future marketing runs from reselecting saturated same-family curator/directory lanes during the active repair window
expected_outcome.measurement_window: effective immediately on the next lane-selection run
expected_outcome.replacement_condition: If the loop still drifts into saturated families, repair the executor/override layer next instead of trusting selector output alone
